sectionTitle: Store Trash or Preserve a Legacy?
sectionDescription: We don't create instant messages. We create memories that live forever.

comparisons.roots: Scan QR, use instantly on Web

advantages.title: Depth Above All
advantages.description: While other apps optimize for convenience, we optimize for enduring spiritual values.

advantages.title: Understanding Vietnamese Cultural Nuances
advantages.description: We know Vietnamese parents often find it hard to express love. Roots acts as the 'narrator' to bridge the two generations.

advantages.title: Sacred Privacy
advantages.description: Your family's emotional data is unique. We commit to never commercializing or analyzing your personal stories.
